name: WP-3 — Consent: wire consent.ts (30+ sites) + consent inngest to consent-v2
description: Wire all 30+ unbranched consent reader/writer sites in services/consent.ts plus inngest consent-reminders and consent-revocation onto the consent-v2 twin. Enumeration §3.2 / §6 WP-3.
acceptanceCriteria: All consent.ts and consent inngest sites read/write the canonical consent model (consent_grant / consent_request; docs/canon/identity/data-model.md) — canon wins, S0–S6 design choices are NOT canonical. Flag-gated on IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED with the legacy path intact until WP-FLAG. Unit + integration suites green.
